svg.title: Bedroom two memory fragment (apartment four) - suspended workspace
svg.desc: Looking straight at the desk corner of a quiet bedroom-workspace: a low matte-oak desk with a slim black monitor that reflects a perfect miniature of the room back at the camera, a wireless keyboard centered in front of it, a small arc lamp casting a too-sharp shadow on the desk top, a dusty-sage coffee mug, a small stack of two notebooks with a pen squared exactly on top, and organized cables clipped to the back leg of the desk. A mid-back mesh office chair sits in front, its back rising into frame from below. A cropped window on the left looks out onto a flat sky that has not changed shade for hours. A single small framed print hangs on the wall, perfectly level. The room is softly overlit, sparsely furnished, and nothing animates. The cursor on the screen does not blink. Time appears paused.
